g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a student submit an assessment to an LMS?')
sendPrompt('How does an LMS notify an assessor of a new submission?')
sendPrompt('What does an assessor look for when grading an assessment?')
sendPrompt('What criteria determine a pass or fail?')
sendPrompt('How does an assessor post a pass result to the LMS?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a student receives a pass result?')
sendPrompt('How does an assessor record a pass in a college enrollment system?')
sendPrompt('How does an assessor send fail feedback through the LMS?')
sendPrompt('How does the LMS deliver fail feedback to a student?')
sendPrompt('What should a student do when they receive a fail result?')
sendPrompt('What is the maximum number of resubmissions allowed?')
sendPrompt('What should a student include when resubmitting an assessment?')
sendPrompt('How does the LMS handle a resubmission?')
sendPrompt('Does an assessor grade a resubmission differently?')
sendPrompt('How does the LMS record a final fail outcome?')
sendPrompt('How does an assessor record a final fail in the enrollment system?')
